overview.title: BMAD Notion Integration Setup Guide
overview.description: Complete guide for setting up modern Notion integration with Airtable

phases.title: Notion Database Configuration
phases.description: Configure existing Notion database with modern properties
steps: Add Type property (Select): Business Reference, Technical Reference, Component
Add Status property (Select): Active, Completed, In Progress, Archived
Add Priority property (Select): High, Medium, Low
Add AI Integration Status property (Select): Not Integrated, Planning, In Progress, Integrated, Advanced
Add Automation Level property (Select): Manual, Basic, Intermediate, Advanced, Fully Automated
Add Smart Sync Status property (Select): Not Synced, Basic Sync, Advanced Sync, Real-time Sync

phases.title: Data Organization and Migration
phases.description: Organize existing data and implement RGID system
steps: Review all existing records in Notion database
Extract information from Name field content
Populate new properties with extracted data
Generate RGID for each record using format: RGID_NOTION_BUSINESS_REF_20240922_XXX

phases.title: Airtable Integration Setup
phases.description: Set up bidirectional sync with Airtable
steps: Configure Airtable webhooks for real-time updates
Set up Notion API integration for bidirectional sync
Create sync automation workflows in n8n
Test sync functionality with sample data

phases.title: Advanced Features Implementation
steps: Set up automated workflows for common tasks
Set up monitoring and alerting systems
